text:
Created attachment 180659
seafdav.diff

This is a version bump to seafdav to keep inline with seafobj. There is no functionality change just a version bump with no commits between versions.

* Updated to 6.0.8

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
